transcripts.name: Golden Eagle Discovery Meeting
transcripts.note: First meeting with GE team. Should produce many updates.

expected_edits.description: Stage → Discovery (first meeting happened)
Champion → Tammy (she's the internal contact, supplemented Jay's answers)
Pain Points → paid search declining; SEO regressed after site rebuild; lead response lag up to 24hrs; no analytics discipline
Marketing Situation → YouTube is #1 lead source; JumpFly manages paid search + SEO; Facebook boosted posts; Luke (Jay's son) does video
Marketing budget → ~$600k/year total including labor
Priority interests → photorealistic AI renderings of floor plans; AI competitor analysis / SEO automation
Notes → customers are top 10% earners; sales cycle 1–3 years; YouTube home tours are #1 lead driver; frustrated by wasted ad spend
Title → IT Manager
Title → Sales staff
Relationship to Jay → Stepson (Tammy said 'not to be confused with Lucas, who's stepson')
Title → General Manager
Title → Pricing (intro: 'Andy Eichinger, he is lip pricing')

transcripts.name: Internal Planning (Ana + Daniel)
transcripts.note: Internal call. Updates: proposal value, interview plan, Tammy confirmed.

expected_edits.description: Value → $15,000 (proposal mentioned: 'if we nail this... the $15,000 proposal sells itself')
Next action → schedule 6 sales rep interviews + Friday debrief; prep conversation guides
Notes → Golden Eagle uses Microsoft Teams for meetings
Role → internal champion; most candid contact; confirmed interest in sales piece
Confirmed interest → recording meetings, transcripts, action items, follow-up automation ('that's what she said, we want this')

transcripts.name: CRM Mockup Demo to Dad
transcripts.note: Internal product discussion with Ana's dad. Should return [] — no new GE engagement facts.

transcripts.name: Feature Planning (Ana + Daniel)
transcripts.note: Scope discussion. Key: email Chris, $15k scope warning, financing as process area.

expected_edits.description: Next action → send email to Chris Stitcher (GM) to follow up on rep interview scheduling ('send an email tonight to Chris')
Role → manages the sales reps; contact for scheduling interviews ('Chris reached out to everyone')

transcripts.name: Coordination (Ana + Daniel)
transcripts.note: Interview scheduling update. Reps not responding. Priority order established.

expected_edits.description: Interview Status → emails sent to Tammy and Sean; reps not responding within 24hrs; considering escalating to Chris
Next action → talk to Tammy first (most candid); then Sean; Chris after reps; Jay last ('intentionally wanted him later in the week')
